CVE-2019-16892.title: In Rubyzip before 1.3.0, a crafted ZIP file can bypass applicatio ...
CVE-2019-16892.summary: In Rubyzip before 1.3.0, a crafted ZIP file can bypass application checks on ZIP entry sizes because data about the uncompressed size can be spoofed. This allows attackers to cause a denial of service (disk consumption).
